drawer.title: Request a Clothing Swap
drawer.description: Interested in this item? Choose items from your collection to submit a swap.
drawer.fee: The admin fee is only paid if the owner accepts your request.
drawer.multiple: You can select multiple items to submit.

list.title: Swap List
list.description: If the owner does not confirm within 3 days, the swap request will be canceled automatically. You can try another item.
